meta.title: Teleprompter Online – Free Browser Teleprompter, No Signup
meta.description: A free online teleprompter that runs in your browser. Paste your script, adjust speed and font, mirror for reflective rigs, go fullscreen, and start recording. No signup, no install.

hero.title: Free online teleprompter for creators
hero.subtitle: Paste your script, hit play, and read with confidence. Teleprompter Online works right in your browser on desktop, tablet and phone — no install, no account, no watermark.

intro.title: What is an online teleprompter?
paragraphs: An online teleprompter is a browser-based tool that scrolls your script at a steady, readable pace while you record or speak on camera. It replaces both expensive hardware rigs and heavy desktop software with a page you open in a web browser. That accessibility is why teleprompters have moved beyond TV studios into the hands of YouTubers, podcasters, educators, sales teams and anyone who goes on camera regularly.

Teleprompter Online is built around one idea: the fewer buttons between you and the next take, the better. Paste your script, adjust speed and font, and press play. Mirror mode, fullscreen, landscape lock on mobile, and a short countdown before you begin are all there when you need them — and out of the way when you don't.

Everything runs locally in your browser. Scripts are never uploaded, tracked, or sold. That distinction quietly matters the moment you prepare a confidential briefing, a product announcement, or a client-facing message.

tips.title: Tips for a natural on-camera read
tips.subtitle: A good teleprompter reads with you, not for you. Small habits make the biggest difference in how confident and conversational you sound.

items.title: Rehearse at the real speed
items.body: Do two or three warm-up passes at the scroll speed you'll actually record at. It lets you calibrate both your pace and your breathing before the record light turns on.

items.title: Write for the ear
items.body: Short sentences, one idea per line, contractions where they sound natural. Your script should read the way you talk, not the way you write a formal email.

items.title: Line up with the lens
items.body: Place your phone, tablet or monitor as close to the camera as you can. The smaller the eye travel between your script and the lens, the more you appear to meet your viewer's eyes.

items.title: Use mirror for glass rigs
items.body: If you read through a beam-splitter teleprompter, flip the text horizontally so it reads correctly in the reflection. A single tap turns it on or off.

items.title: Read a line ahead
items.body: Let your eye scan one line before your voice catches up. It sounds more natural than reading the exact word you're on and gives you time to add inflection.

items.title: Aim for one-take reads
items.body: Continuous takes feel less robotic than heavily cut edits. Playback stops automatically at the end of your script so the final beat lands cleanly.

features.title: Everything you need to read on camera
features.subtitle: Built with the simplicity of classic tools and the polish of modern web apps.

instant.title: Instant, no signup
instant.body: Open the page, paste your script and hit play. There's nothing to install and no account to create.

speedFont.title: Smooth speed & font control
speedFont.body: Dial in the right scroll speed and text size for your delivery, from calm 20 px/s to rapid 400 px/s.

mirror.title: Mirror mode
mirror.body: Flip the text horizontally or vertically to use with a beam-splitter teleprompter rig in front of any camera.

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen focus
fullscreen.body: One tap to go distraction-free. The reading indicator keeps you on the next line at a glance.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.body: Play, pause, adjust speed and font, and toggle mirror without ever leaving the keyboard.

savedScripts.title: Saved scripts
savedScripts.body: Keep multiple scripts on your device. Everything is stored privately in your browser — nothing leaves your computer.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.body: Tuned for phones and tablets with large touch targets, safe-area padding and landscape fullscreen.

privacy.title: Privacy-friendly
privacy.body: No tracking of your scripts, no uploads. The teleprompter engine runs entirely client-side.

useCases.title: Made for every kind of speaker
useCases.subtitle: From first-time creators to seasoned presenters, Teleprompter Online adapts to your flow.

youtubers.title: YouTubers
youtubers.body: Record sharper intros and B-roll scripts without stumbling over the next line.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to a smoother take

one.title: Paste your script
one.body: Drop in text from Docs, Word or anywhere else. Your script stays in your browser.

two.title: Tune speed & font
two.body: Adjust scroll speed, font size and mirror to match your camera and comfort level.

three.title: Press play & record
three.body: Go fullscreen and read with confidence. Use your phone, tablet or computer — whatever you have.

items.a: Yes. The app is fully usable for free, forever. There's no account, no watermark, no feature gate and no upload.

items.q: Do I need to install anything?
items.a: No. Teleprompter Online runs directly in your web browser. It works on Chrome, Safari, Firefox and Edge on desktop, tablet and phone.
Yes. Your script never leaves your device. Saved scripts live in your browser's local storage and are not uploaded to any server.

items.q: Can I use this with a physical teleprompter rig?
items.a: Yes. Use the mirror toggle to flip the text horizontally for a beam-splitter teleprompter in front of your camera.
It's designed for mobile. You get large touch targets, landscape fullscreen and a tuned default font size that reads comfortably on small screens.

items.q: Can I control scroll speed while reading?
items.a: Yes. Use the arrow keys on desktop or the on-screen speed slider on mobile to adjust scroll speed in real time.

items.q: Does the teleprompter stop at the end?
items.a: Yes. Playback gently stops at the end of your script. Press Restart to go back to the top.

cta.title: Ready to read on camera with confidence?
cta.subtitle: Open the prompter, paste your script, and press play.

meta.title: Features – Teleprompter Online
meta.description: Explore every feature of Teleprompter Online: scroll speed control, font tuning, mirror mode, fullscreen, keyboard shortcuts, saved scripts and privacy-first storage.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: A complete list of what Teleprompter Online can do.

prompter.title: Prompter engine
items: Smooth 60 fps scroll powered by requestAnimationFrame.
Scroll speed from 20 px/s to 400 px/s with fine steps.
Optional 3-second countdown before playback starts.
Centered reading indicator so you always know the next line.
Playback automatically stops when your script ends.

typography.title: Typography & display
items: Font size from 16 px to 128 px.
Sans, serif and mono font family presets.
Adjustable line height for comfortable reading.
Mirror horizontally or vertically for teleprompter rigs.
Dark and light themes.

controls.title: Controls & shortcuts
items: Keyboard: Space play/pause, arrows for speed, +/- for font, M mirror, F fullscreen.
Tap-to-pause on the prompter canvas for touch devices.
Fullscreen with landscape orientation lock on supported mobile browsers.
A minimal control bar stays out of the way while you read.

scripts.title: Scripts & storage
items: Paste any plain text or formatted content.
Save multiple named scripts privately in your browser.
Load or delete scripts with one click.
Nothing is uploaded — your content stays on your device.

platform.title: Platform & privacy
items: Works on any modern browser: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge.
Responsive layout for phone, tablet and desktop.
Available in six languages with matching content.
No tracking of your scripts and no third-party analytics selling your data.

meta.title: How to use the online teleprompter
meta.description: Learn how to use Teleprompter Online in minutes: paste your script, adjust speed and font, mirror for reflective rigs, and start recording.

howToUse.title: How to use Teleprompter Online
howToUse.subtitle: Get a smoother take in a couple of minutes.

steps.title: Open the prompter
steps.body: Go to teleprompteronline.net. No login, no install. You're already on the prompter page.

steps.title: Paste your script
steps.body: Copy text from any document — Google Docs, Microsoft Word, Notion, plain text — and paste it into the script area.

steps.title: Choose your speed and font
steps.body: Use the speed slider to match your natural pace. Pick a font size that feels comfortable from a reading distance.

steps.title: Turn on mirror mode if needed
steps.body: If you use a glass teleprompter rig, flip the text horizontally so it reads correctly through the reflection.

steps.title: Go fullscreen
steps.body: Tap the fullscreen button for a distraction-free view. On mobile, the prompter will switch to landscape if your device supports it.

steps.title: Press play and record
steps.body: Hit Play (or the Space bar) and start your recording. Use arrow keys or the on-screen slider to nudge speed mid-read.

tips: Do a short rehearsal to find your ideal speed before recording.
Keep a comfortable distance between your eyes and the screen — around an arm's length for phones.
If you're filming with an external camera, place the phone or tablet as close to the lens as possible to preserve eye contact.
Break long paragraphs into shorter lines. Scripts scroll better when each line is readable in one glance.
Save your common intros and outros as named scripts to reuse later.

meta.title: Privacy policy – Teleprompter Online
meta.description: How Teleprompter Online handles your data. Spoiler: we don't collect your scripts.

sections.title: The short version
sections.body: Teleprompter Online is a static web app that runs entirely in your browser. We don't create accounts, we don't receive your scripts, and we don't sell data.

sections.title: What stays on your device
sections.body: Any scripts you save are stored in your browser's local storage on the device you used. Clearing your browser data will remove them. They are never uploaded to a server.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.body: We may use privacy-friendly, aggregate analytics (such as Cloudflare Web Analytics) to understand which pages are used. These analytics do not use cookies or personal identifiers and do not track you across sites.

sections.title: Third parties
sections.body: The site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may log infrastructure-level request data (such as IP addresses) for security and abuse prevention.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: Questions about privacy? Reach out through the contact details on our website.

meta.title: Terms of service – Teleprompter Online
meta.description: The terms under which you can use Teleprompter Online.

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.body: By using Teleprompter Online you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.title: Use of the service
sections.body: Teleprompter Online is provided free of charge, as-is, for personal and commercial use. You are responsible for the content of your scripts.

sections.title: No warranty
sections.body: The service is provided without warranty of any kind. We do our best to keep it reliable, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, the operators of Teleprompter Online are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

sections.title: Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for isn't here. It may have been moved or never existed.
